Welcome Back!: A horizontal rule centred in the spacing band.

Welcome Back!: Leaves slide-specific anchor; falls back to the slideshow's default.

Welcome Back!: Pause for 20 s after user nav
`Auto` matches the natural image height (jumps between slides).

Welcome Back!: Optional. SVG or raster image. Hidden when icons are turned off globally.

Welcome Back!: Optional. Makes the whole cell clickable.
Üdvözöljük újra!: Opcionális. Az egész cellát kattinthatóvá teszi.

Welcome Back!: Auto matches the item count, capped at 4.

Welcome Back!: Master switch. Items without an icon URL are unaffected.
Üdvözöljük újra!: Fő kapcsoló. Az ikon URL nélküli elemek nem érintettek.

Welcome Back!: Defaults to the picked collection's name.
Defaults to the collection's description. Setting this replaces the rich-text description with plain text.

Welcome Back!: e.g. Hand-picked styles for the season.
Optional. Hidden when empty. Pick a category, product, page, or paste a custom URL.

Welcome Back!: Defaults to the picked collection name.
Optional. One or two sentences of editorial copy.

Welcome Back!: Small label above the product name. Optional.

Welcome Back!: Two lines of copy explaining why this product is being spotlighted right now.

Welcome Back!: Flexible content block mixing prose sections and accordion FAQ groups.
